mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO team1Table (sector_name, year, quarter, sales_amount, sales_count) VALUES
(#{item.sectorName}, #{item.year}, #{item.quarter}, #{item.salesAmount}, #{item.salesCount})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM team1Table ORDER BY year ASC, quarter ASC
SELECT * FROM team1Table WHERE sector_name = #{sectorName} ORDER BY year ASC, quarter ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO team1Table (sector_name, year, quarter, sales_amount, sales_count) VALUES
(#{item.sectorName}, #{item.year}, #{item.quarter}, #{item.salesAmount}, #{item.salesCount})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sales_amount = VALUES(sales_amount), sales_count = VALUES(sales_count)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM team1Table ORDER BY year ASC, quarter ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
